seoTitle: Milsons Point vs Milvale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Milsons Point and Milvale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Milsons Point vs Milvale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Milsons Point and Milvale.
heading: Milsons Point vs Milvale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Milsons Point, New South Wales and Milvale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Milvale has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Milsons Point (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Milsons Point or Milvale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Milsons Point has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Milvale scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Milsons Point scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Milvale scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Milsons Point or Milvale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Milvale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
